description: A player agrees to be 'mic'd up' for a game, wearing a microphone to capture on-field audio for a broadcast segment.

nodes.task_description: Secure the player's consent and equip them with the microphone before the game.

expected_outcome.value: The player is properly equipped with the audio equipment.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the live audio feed during the game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent listens to the audio in real time.

nodes.task_description: After the game, review the audio and select the best, most broadcast-appropriate clips.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects several interesting and clean audio clips.

nodes.task_description: Edit the clips into a segment for the post-game show.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces the final 'mic'd up' segment.
